title: Workday Advanced Compensation Solution Architect & Functional Lead - 7 months contract
description:
We are looking for an experienced Workday specialist to support an HCM implementation using Workday. The role is part of a Business & Technology Integration team working with a leading financialservices organization that is modernizing its HR systems.

Role Overview

As the Workday Advanced Compensation Solution Architect & Functional Lead, you will design and lead end-to-end Workday solutions, focusing on Core HCM and Advanced Compensation. You will work closely with clients and project teams to understand business needs, design future-state HR processes, and ensure the Workday solution supports the client’s long-term goals.

You will act as a Workday subject matter expert, providing functional leadership, guidance, and decision support throughout the project.

Key Responsibilities

Solution Design

  • Lead Workday design sessions and define business and functional requirements.
  • Design scalable solutions using Workday Core HCM and Advanced Compensation.
  • Identify opportunities to improve processes through automation and best practices.
  • Present solution recommendations to senior stakeholders.

Team Leadership & Collaboration

  • Provide functional leadership across design, configuration, testing, and deployment.
  • Work closely with clients, project managers, and technical teams.
  • Resolve cross-team issues and support problem resolution during build and testing.

Advisory & Continuous Improvement

  • Analyze HR processes and recommend improvements.
  • Propose innovative solutions to enhance efficiency and user experience.
  • Support continuous improvement across the Workday project lifecycle.

Required Skills & Experience

  • Workday Advanced Compensation Certification (required).
  • Workday Core HCM Certification (required).
  • Strong hands-on experience with Workday Core HCM and Advanced Compensation.
  • Solid understanding of end-to-end HR processes in complex organizations.
  • Proven leadership and stakeholder management skills.
  • Strong problem-solving ability and solution-focused mindset

Salary : S$8,000.00 - $9,000.00

Location : Town

Interested applicants, please submit your application to Teresa.chan@persolapac.com

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.
